title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Tama, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Gya ago!! Oh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: KyaAAY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What are you doing??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: KyaA Oooh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Paw.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: HUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUH!? She tamed that monster!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didiiiittit!! I finally managed to convince the "ragging baboon of the mountain" to be on our side!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're an ability user? That sure looks like a handy power!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...by the way, can you tell me if this is the wano country?

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Yes!! You are in Kuri, big brother*!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this incident happened on my way back from shopping in town...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was found by those evil people who had this baboon with them...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Koma-CCHyo attacked the baboon in order to protect me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah, so that's why they were fighting.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WOOF!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But when that happened... all of my belong- ings were taken away from me!! I was so Frus- Trated...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You better remember this!!! When the Kouzuki family comes back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...So I ended up saying something taboo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...I see.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I almost got myself into a situation where I would never have been able to return home again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I WANT TO RE PAY YOU IN SOME WAY, BIG BROTHER!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, that would be great! I have a lot of questions about this place!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ALL RIGHT. SO YOU'RE HUNGRY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Your ship will be safe here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No enemies will be able to locate it, big brother.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: oops. I thought we had food on the ship, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry about it! I'll make you a meal!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are pirates that I hate, and pirates that I like!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big brother, you're one of the kind and strong ones.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't really care about stuff like that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, is there a village on this mountain?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Komainu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Koma- Cchiyo

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: New Member BABOOD- MARU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No, not anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My master and I are the only people that still live here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to be an enchanting Kanoichi* someday!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's so dirty and small...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And it stinks!! Hahaha haha.

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: That's a little rude, big brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is it ready yet, Tamaa AAAA!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yes!! I'm bringing it now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: here.

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Please dig in, Big Brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This is fresh steamed rice!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Thank you for the meal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: YUM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ARENT YOU GOING TO EAT, TOO?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right! In order for me to be a kunoichi, I must make sure to keep my body very light!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'll have more then, please!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So fast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But... that was all of it....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we don't have any more side-dishes, either...

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 56 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
